votes.reason: The Python implementation of filter_integers_impl and its specification correctly mirror the Coq logic, using list comprehensions and membership checks that correspond to the inductive definition and logical properties in Coq.
The Python implementation correctly translates the Coq inductive types to classes, and the functions and specification accurately reflect the Coq logic on concrete inputs.
The Python code correctly translates the Coq inductive types, functions, and specification, maintaining the exact same concrete behavior.

The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification. filter_integers_impl extracts integers from PyInt values in order, matching the Coq recursive definition. filter_integers_spec checks both that result equals the implementation output and verifies the bidirectional membership property (z in result iff there exists a PyInt z in values). The concrete behavior matches for all inputs.

The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification. filter_integers_impl extracts integers from PyInt values in order, matching the Coq recursive definition. filter_integers_spec checks both that result equals filter_integers_impl(values) and verifies the bidirectional membership property (z in result iff there exists a PyInt(z) in values). The concrete behavior matches for all inputs.

The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification. filter_integers_impl extracts integers from PyInt values in order, matching the Coq recursive definition. filter_integers_spec checks both that result equals filter_integers_impl(values) and verifies the bidirectional membership property (every z in result comes from a PyInt in values, and every PyInt in values has its integer in result). The concrete behavior matches for all inputs.

Constructors and checks align; is_integer matches PyInt, get_int returns value or None consistent with option, filter_integers_impl preserves order and values, and filter_integers_spec enforces equality to impl plus the same membership property.
Python mirrors Coq: PyInt detection, get_int returning value or None, and filtering integers preserving order. The spec check matches result equality and membership equivalence as in Coq.

Python mirrors the Coq behavior: type checks and get_int match, filter_integers_impl preserves order and duplicates of PyInt values, and filter_integers_spec enforces equality to the implementation and the same membership property.
